lanes.label: OpenClaw

capabilities.label: Remote approvals
capabilities.detail: Messaging-first control plane with phone-friendly inbox patterns.

capabilities.label: Managed skills
capabilities.detail: Bundled, managed, and workspace skills are supported.

capabilities.label: Multi-channel routing
capabilities.detail: Routes messages and approvals across Telegram and other channels.

lanes.launchCommand: openclaw agent --agent fluxio_mission_openclaw_lane_proof_d228bebc --session-id fluxio_mission_openclaw_lane_proof --message "Prove runtime route metadata and skill visibility only. Do not call a model, edit files, or perform live red-team actions." --thinking medium --json
lanes.routeSummary: OpenClaw launch route: plan:executor -> openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini (medium thinking)
lanes.proofMeaning: OpenClaw owns gateway-style execution, remote approvals, and JSON session output.

readiness.summary: Deterministic route contract is present; live CLI/auth/session proof is still required.

gates.label: OpenClaw CLI available
gates.recoveryAction: Run setup doctor or install OpenClaw before promoting this lane to live execution.

gates.label: OpenAI/Codex route configured
gates.recoveryAction: Connect Codex OAuth or configure the OpenAI route, then rerun provider health checks.

gates.label: Route contract written
gates.recoveryAction: Rebuild the deterministic lane proof if this gate disappears.

gates.label: JSON session output observed
gates.recoveryAction: Run one bounded OpenClaw proving mission and attach the runtime session events.

readiness.nextRecoveryAction: Run setup doctor or install OpenClaw before promoting this lane to live execution.

lanes.label: Hermes

capabilities.label: Scheduled automations
capabilities.detail: Hermes has built-in scheduling and long-running agent loops.

capabilities.label: Skills and memory
capabilities.detail: Hermes learns and recalls skills across sessions.

capabilities.label: Delegation
capabilities.detail: Hermes can spawn isolated subagents for parallel workstreams.

lanes.launchCommand: hermes chat -q "Prove runtime route metadata and skill visibility only. Do not call a model, edit files, or perform live red-team actions." -Q --model MiniMax-M3 --provider minimax
lanes.proofMeaning: Hermes owns long-running agent loops, scheduling, memory, and skill reuse.

readiness.summary: Deterministic route contract is present; live CLI/auth/session proof is still required.

gates.label: Hermes CLI available
gates.recoveryAction: Repair Hermes from setup or NAS runtime doctor before long-running delegated work.

gates.label: MiniMax route configured
gates.recoveryAction: Connect the MiniMax/OpenClaw auth route or choose a cheaper verified model route.

gates.label: Skill payload visible
gates.recoveryAction: Attach the selected skill payload before relaunching the Hermes lane.

gates.label: Transcript proof observed
gates.recoveryAction: Run a supervised synthetic lab transcript and attach visible prompts, responses, scores, and reviewer notes.

readiness.nextRecoveryAction: Repair Hermes from setup or NAS runtime doctor before long-running delegated work.

lanes.nextRecoveryAction: Run setup doctor or install OpenClaw before promoting this lane to live execution.
